steps.title: Use the given value of $r$
steps.content: The second equation already says $r=3$. Substitute that into $s+7r=27$: $$s+7(3)=27.$$

steps.title: Solve for $s$
steps.content: This gives $s+21=27$, so $s=6$. The ordered pair is requested as $(r,s)$, so the solution is $(3,6)$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The answer is $(3,6)$. Choice A reverses the order and gives $(s,r)$. The pairs $(3,27)$ and $(27,3)$ do not satisfy both $r=3$ and $s+7r=27$.
